how_it_works.title: Describe Your Restaurant
how_it_works.description: Tell us about the atmosphere, cuisine, and highlights — AI will understand everything.

how_it_works.title: AI Generates the Website
how_it_works.description: Ready design with texts, page structure, and menu section will appear in seconds.

how_it_works.title: Customize and Publish
how_it_works.description: Add photos, adjust texts, and launch your website live.

faq.question: Do I need technical skills to create a restaurant website?
faq.answer: No. Promto is AI-powered — simply describe your restaurant and the system creates the website automatically.

faq.question: Can I add an online menu with prices?
faq.answer: Yes, you can display a full menu with dish descriptions, prices, and photos. Update it anytime you want.

faq.question: How can guests reserve a table?
faq.answer: A booking form will appear on your site — guest selects date, time, and party size, and you receive the notification.

faq.question: Will the website look good on smartphones?
faq.answer: Yes, all Promto websites are mobile-optimized and look great on any screen.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a restaurant website?
faq.answer: Start for free — create the website and see the result. Paid plans unlock additional features and custom domain connection.

faq.question: Can I connect my own domain?
faq.answer: Yes, you can connect any domain to your website in the project settings.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will generate design and texts — you'll just need to add photos.
cta_final_subtitle: Launch a professional website in 5 minutes — no coders or designers needed.
